evals.prompt: I run a DTC e-commerce brand and want to start a loyalty program. How should I design it?
evals.expected_output: Loyalty program design with points, tiers, earning rules, and rewards tailored to DTC e-commerce

assertions.name: program_structure
assertions.description: Response must recommend a specific program type (points, tiers, or hybrid) with reasoning

assertions.name: earning_rules
assertions.description: Response must include specific earning rules with point values (e.g., points per dollar spent)

assertions.name: reward_catalog
assertions.description: Response must suggest specific rewards with redemption thresholds

evals.prompt: Which loyalty platform should I use for my Shopify store?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of loyalty platforms with Shopify focus

assertions.name: compares_platforms
assertions.description: Response must compare at least 3 loyalty platforms (e.g., Smile.io, LoyaltyLion, Yotpo)

assertions.name: shopify_integration
assertions.description: Response must specifically address Shopify integration quality for each platform

assertions.name: pricing_tiers
assertions.description: Response must mention pricing or free tiers to help the user decide

evals.prompt: How do I set up a tiered loyalty program in Brevo with automated notifications?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to creating a Brevo Loyalty program with tiers and automation journeys

assertions.name: brevo_loyalty_setup
assertions.description: Response must reference Brevo Loyalty features (programs, subscriptions, tiers, balances)

assertions.name: tier_design
assertions.description: Response must include specific tier design with progression criteria

assertions.name: automation_triggers
assertions.description: Response must explain how to trigger Brevo automation journeys based on loyalty events
